title: Ventas Announces Plans to Take Ownership of Full Collateral Pool Supporting its $486 Million Santerre Mezzanine Loan
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today announced that it intends to take ownership of the collateral that supports its approximately $486 million cash-pay mezzanine loan to Santerre Health Investors (the “Santerre Mezzanine Loan”).

title: Ventas Declares First Quarter 2023 Dividend of $0.45 per Common Share
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per common share. The dividend will be payable in cash on April 13, 2023 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on April 3, 2023. About Ventas Ventas Inc., an S&P 500 company, operates at the intersection of two large and dynamic industries – healthcare and real estate.

title: Ventas, Inc. (VTR) Presents at Citi 2023 Global Property CEO Conference (Transcript)
text: Ventas, Inc. (NYSE:VTR ) Citi 2023 Global Property CEO Conference March 7, 2023 3:00 PM ET Company Participants Debra Cafaro - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bob Probst - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Justin Hutchens - Executive Vice President, Senior Housing and Chief Investment Officer Conference Call Participants Michael Griffin - Citigroup Nick Joseph - Citi Research Michael Griffin Welcome to the 3 PM. Tuesday session at Citi's 2023 Global Property CEO Conference.

title: Ventas to Participate in Investor Meetings at Citi 2023 Global Property CEO Conference
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) announced today that management will make a presentation at the Citi 2023 Global Property CEO Conference (the “Citi Conference”) on March 7, 2023 at 3:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The webcast will be accessible on the Company's website at ir.ventasreit.com/events-and-presentations.

title: It's Time for 2 Vital Healthcare Businesses to Shine for Investors
text: Welltower and Ventas got hammered during the pandemic because of their senior housing assets. That's changing in a big way.
